summary: RichTextEditor + HTML Sanitization testing complete. Backend 12/12 pass. Frontend fully working except one critical bug (Textarea missing import in LegalPage.js) was fixed during testing. One minor display bug found: HTML tags show as raw text in news card previews.

minor.issue: bleach with strip=True removes <script> tags but leaves inner text as plain text (e.g., 'alert(1)' becomes plain text). This is expected bleach behavior - tag is neutralized so script cannot execute, but text remains visible. Not a security issue.

ui_bugs.component: NewsPage.js (news listing cards) and AdminNewsTab.js (admin news list)
ui_bugs.issue:
News card preview renders raw HTML tags as plain text when content contains HTML (e.g., '

Test News Heading

Test paragraph...' visible as text in card preview). Fix: strip HTML before showing preview in both NewsPage.js line 361 and AdminNewsTab.js line 106.

passed_tests: All 9 toolbar buttons visible in Admin Aktuality tab: H1, H2, H3, P, Bold, Italic, List, Link, Table
rich-editor-area testid present and accepts input
H1 formatting applied when clicking editor-h1 button
Bullet list (UL/LI tags) created when clicking editor-ul button
Table popup opens with table-rows-input, table-cols-input, table-insert-btn
Table inserted into editor on clicking table-insert-btn
News creation from admin with HTML content succeeds (toast 'Aktualita přidána!')
POST /api/news - script tags stripped by bleach sanitization
POST /api/news - allowed tags (h1,h2,h3,p,strong,em,ul,li,a) preserved
POST /api/news - table tags (table,thead,tbody,tr,td,th) preserved with style attrs
POST /api/news - iframe stripped
POST /api/news - onclick attribute stripped
GET /api/articles returns list with content field
POST /api/articles creates article with HTML, script tags stripped
PUT /api/articles/:id updates and sanitizes HTML content
DELETE /api/articles/:id removes article, GET returns 404
GET /api/admin/articles returns all articles
PUT /api/articles/:id/toggle-publish toggles state correctly
Plain text backward compat - news with plain text content works
LegalPage loads with data-testid='legal-page'
Article cards render without raw HTML tags visible
Article detail view renders HTML via dangerouslySetInnerHTML correctly
Create article dialog uses RichTextEditor (not plain textarea)
Edit article dialog uses RichTextEditor with pre-populated content
Question dialog opens with title input and content textarea (after Textarea import fix)
No JS errors on legal page or question dialog
News detail page renders HTML content correctly (headings, bold, lists all rendered)
action_items: Fix HTML preview in news listing cards - strip HTML tags before showing preview in NewsPage.js line 361: change n.content.replace(/https?:\/\/\S+/g,'') to n.content.replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').replace(/https?:\/\/\S+/g,'')
Fix HTML preview in admin news list - AdminNewsTab.js line 106: change {n.content} to {n.content.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').substring(0, 100)}
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: LegalPage.js was missing 'import { Textarea } from ../components/ui/textarea' while Textarea was used on line 334 for the question dialog content input. This caused a ReferenceError when opening the Add Question dialog. Fixed by adding the import.
MEDIUM: NewsPage.js line 361 renders n.content raw in card preview. With rich text content this shows HTML tags as plain text. Should strip HTML: n.content.replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim()
MEDIUM: AdminNewsTab.js line 106 renders {n.content} raw in admin news cards. Same issue - raw HTML tags visible when content is rich text.
MINOR: bleach sanitization correctly strips script/iframe/onclick but leaves inner text (this is expected bleach behavior, not a bug)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (27/28 - raw HTML in card previews is a display bug)

seed_data_creation: TEST_XSS News created during backend tests and cleaned up. TEST_Admin_RichText_News created during admin flow test and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RichTextEditor is fully working in both Admin Aktuality tab and LegalPage (create/edit article dialogs). Backend sanitization works via bleach. Key fix applied: Textarea import added to LegalPage.js line 8. Remaining issue: HTML tags show as raw text in news listing card previews (NewsPage.js line 361 and AdminNewsTab.js line 106). Admin credentials: test1@bloom.cz / test123. Use localStorage.setItem('token', ...) injection approach for Playwright tests.

Textarea_missing_import.bug: LegalPage.js uses Textarea component at line 334 for question dialog content but didn't import it
Textarea_missing_import.root_cause: When RichTextEditor was added to LegalPage.js and the old imports were cleaned up, the Textarea import was accidentally removed
Textarea_missing_import.fix: Added: import { Textarea } from '../components/ui/textarea'; to LegalPage.js imports
Textarea_missing_import.reproduction: Navigate to /legal, click 'Přidat otázku' button - previously would crash with ReferenceError: Textarea is not defined

html_preview_raw_tags.bug: News cards in listing page and admin show raw HTML tags in preview text
html_preview_raw_tags.root_cause: NewsPage.js line 361 and AdminNewsTab.js line 106 render n.content directly without stripping HTML tags
html_preview_raw_tags.fix: Add .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '') to strip HTML before preview truncation
